title: NTTR-051 [Nottori NTR] I'll take over both the woman and the channel! I replaced the female of the video distribution couple and tried to project to my own Ji Po. Aimi Rika - Rika Aimi
description: The popular video distribution couple "Yu & Rika" was on location in the sea early in the season. Yu, who is a boyfriend, is planning to propose to his companion and lover Rika in the sea at night, calling it "chest stunning". Meanwhile, Chiaki, who has been forced to shoot, edit, and chore videos and hates Yu on a regular basis, wanted to prevent her beloved Rika from marrying Yu. During the shooting, when I muttered like a spell, "If I were Rika, I would break up with Yu," my consciousness flew ... When I woke up, Chiaki had moved to Rika's body ...
